stemHtml:
A Lambert conformal conic chart with standard parallels at 54°N and 59°N is used for navigation. The straight line between A 55° 00.0’N 165° 00.0’E and B 58° 00.0’N ’E is drawn on this chart. The True track along the straight line at A is 301° and at is B 292°.

Calculate the longitude of position B.
